title: alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. orientale
intro: Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. orientale, also known as the Oriental Water Plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Alismataceae family. Traditionally used in Eastern medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as iridoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. orientale include the relief of edema, hypertension, and other cardiovascular issues, as well as its potential in treating kidney and liver disorders. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of capsules, tablets, or decoctions, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
benefits: Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. orientale has many benefits, such as its ability to improve digestive health by reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, while also exhibiting antioxidant properties that protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever reduction, cough suppression, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and manage diabetes. Its benefits also extend to the skin, where it has been shown to reduce acne and improve wound healing, and in traditional medicine, it has been used to treat various eye and ear problems. By incorporating Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. orientale into one's lifestyle, individuals can experience improved physical and mental health, leading to enhanced energy levels, reduced stress, and an overall improved quality of life.
actions: Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. orientale has many therapeutic actions, such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, antiviral, and anti-bacterial properties, which help to alleviate symptoms of various conditions, including fever, sore throats, and skin irritations. Its diuretic properties can aid in reducing swelling, relieving symptoms of urinary tract infections, and even managing conditions like hypertension and edema. The plant's ability to soothe digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, can improve overall gut health and enhance nutrient absorption, ultimately leading to increased energy levels and better overall well-being. By addressing these diverse health concerns, Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. orientale can significantly improve daily life, allowing individuals to enjoy better physical and mental health, and a higher quality of life.
intro_study: According to "Nutrients", Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. orientale has been found to have anticancer activity due to the cytotoxic and antimetastatic effects of its alisol compounds, such as alisol A, alisol B, and alisol B 23-acetate.
constituents: Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. orientale has many active constituents, such as flavonoids, alkaloids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. These constituents, including baicalein, baicalin, and aucubin, have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, thereby improving symptoms of various diseases and enhancing overall well-being. The presence of these medicinal compounds helps in the management of conditions like fever, gastrointestinal issues, and respiratory problems, allowing individuals to enjoy better health and quality of life. By utilizing the therapeutic properties of Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. orientale, people can experience relief from pain, reduced risk of infections, and improved mental clarity, ultimately leading to a more fulfilling daily life.
